prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第49名，较2025年第52名小幅上升，层次稳定；近年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第94位（一般），短视频曝光量处于中等偏下水平；2023年曾出现投档线异常信号（低关注），但2025年位次已回弹，未形成持续负面冲击；交通运输工程A+（全国顶尖）、土木工程A，与该校轨道交通、土木类招生专业高度关联，王牌学科对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，但土木建筑类专业处于分化观望至明显劝退状态，可能抑制部分报考意愿；本省物理类考生2021年14.7万→2025年25.0万持续增长，2026年估算约25万人，考生规模高位稳定；省控线2025年426分，近年波动不大；西南交通大学位于四川成都，属西南地区；湖北省非该校本地生源大省，近年在本省招生占比约2%-3%，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次13848名、2026年扩招约10.5%使竞争加剧、土木建筑专业热度降温可能抑制部分报考意愿、本省考生规模高位稳定等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约14700名，区间14200–15200名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14700名，区间14200–15200名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业（交通运输类、机械类、车辆工程等学校特色专业）为主攻方向，一档专业（计算机类、电气类、电子信息类）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（土木、材料等）作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间上限（<14200名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14036 → 14468 → 15084 → 25792 → 13848. In 2024, due to the adjustment of subject requirements to "Physics + Chemistry", the ranking significantly dropped to 25792, but rebounded to 13848 in 2025. The baseline for the recent 3 years (excluding anomalies) is about 13848. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 158 in 2021, 149 in 2022, 138 in 2023, 142 in 2024, and 162 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 179, an increase of about 10.5% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition due to increased admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 49th, slightly up from 52nd in 2025, indicating a stable level. Recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. The comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 94th (average), with short video exposure at a moderately low level. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission threshold (low attention), but the ranking rebounded in 2025 without forming a sustained negative impact. Transportation Engineering is A+ (top in the country), and Civil Engineering is A, highly correlated with the university's rail transit and civil engineering majors. The flagship disciplines strongly attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended. However, civil and architectural majors are in a state of divergence from observation to clear discouragement, which may suppress some application willingness. The number of Physics Category candidates in the province grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 250,000 in 2026, remaining at a high and stable level. The provincial control score line was 426 in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region. Hubei Province is not a major local source province for the university, with recent enrollment accounting for about 2%-3%, so regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 13848, the approximately 10.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, the cooling of civil and architectural major popularity possibly suppressing some application willingness, and the high and stable number of provincial candidates, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 14700, with a range of 14200–15200.

- Artificial Intelligence/Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 14700, with a range of 14200–15200. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Transportation, Mechanical, Vehicle Engineering, etc., which are the university's characteristic majors), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical, Electronic Information) as targets for a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Materials, etc.) as safety choices. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<14200), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言/中文等文科专业社会热度偏热至推荐，师范/教育类分化观望；本省历史类考生2021年14.9万→2025年14.1万，2026年估算约14万人，考生规模基本稳定；省控线2025年442分，近年波动不大；西南交通大学位于四川成都，属西南地区；湖北省非该校本地生源大省，近年历史类招生计划较少（约19–22人），地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3911名、2026年扩招约15.8%使竞争加剧、文科专业热度偏热但学校工科特色对文科吸引力有限、本省考生规模基本稳定等因素，预测2026年历史类最低位次约4266名，区间3766–4766名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3590 → 3353 → 3561 → 3616 → 3911. Over the past five years, it has fluctuated narrowly within the 3300–3900 range. The 2025 baseline is about 3911, the highest in recent years (largest ranking number, least competitive). The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 170 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 19 in 2024, and 19 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 22, an increase of about 15.8% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition due to increased admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 49th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up slightly from 52nd in 2025, with stable tier. Recent reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 94th (average), with short video exposure at a moderately low level. In 2023, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (low attention), but it did not have a lasting impact. Transportation Engineering is A+, Civil Engineering is A, but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Foreign Languages and Literatures, etc.) have low correlation with the university's flagship engineering disciplines, limiting the direct appeal of disciplinary advantages to liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Chinese Literature and other liberal arts majors have social popularity ranging from hot to recommended, while teacher training/education categories are divided and wait-and-see. The number of provincial History Category examinees was 149,000 in 2021 → 141,000 in 2025, with an estimated 140,000 in 2026, basically stable. The provincial control line was 442 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years. Southwest Jiaotong University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region. Hubei Province is not a major local source province for this university, with a small History Category enrollment plan in recent years (about 19–22 people), and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3911, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 15.8% intensifying competition, the hot popularity of liberal arts majors but limited appeal of the university's engineering characteristics to liberal arts students, and the basically stable number of provincial examinees, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 4266, with a range of 3766–4766.
